headline: Eaton to merge Mobility Group with Dana
summary: The combination will bring together Eaton Mobility's commercial vehicle transmissions, engine and emissions products, and advanced electrification capabilities with Dana's global powertrain, thermal, and sealing technologies.

headline: Eaton Mobility And Dana: Separating The Fast Growth From The Slow
summary: Eaton Corporation is spinning off its Mobility business to Dana focusing on higher-growth Electrical and Aerospace segments. Read more on ETN stock here.

headline: Eaton Refocuses On Electrical And Aerospace As Mobility Joins Dana
summary: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) plans to merge its Mobility business with Dana Incorporated in a Reverse Morris Trust transaction. The deal values the combined powertrain business at over $10b, creating a new global player focused on drivetrain and mobility solutions. Eaton intends to sharpen its focus on its Electrical and Aerospace segments as the Mobility unit is separated. Eaton, trading at $393.64, has seen its stock rise 20.3% year to date and 20.5% over the past year, with a very large 3 year gain...
